Tanks

Class Tank

  • java.lang.Object
    • Tanks.Tank

  • public class Tank
extends java.lang.Object
    Represents a tank in the game. The tank can move, rotate its turret, fire projectiles, and handle various states such as health, fuel, and parachutes.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Tank(char name, int x, int y)
      Creates a new Tank with the specified name and initial position.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int calculateDamage(Explosion explosion)
      Calculates the damage from the explosion to the tank.
      void decreasePower()
      Decreases the power level of the tank.
      void draw(App app)
      Draws the tank and its turret, and handles falling.
      Explosion explode(int explosionRadius)
      Creates an explosion at the tank's location.
      Projectile fireProjectile(int powerLevel)
      Fires a projectile from the tank with the given power level.
      int[] getColor(App app)
      Gets the color of the tank.
      int getFuel()
      Gets the current fuel level of the tank.
      int getHealth()
      Gets the current health of the tank.
      boolean getLargerProjectile()
      Checks if the tank is firing a larger projectile.
      char getName()
      Gets the name of the tank.
      int getParachute()
      Gets the number of remaining parachutes the tank has.
      int getPower()
      Gets the power level of the tank.
      double getRotateAngle()
      Gets the current rotation angle of the turret.
      int getScore()
      Gets the score of the tank.
      float getTurretTopX()
      Gets the x-coordinate of the top of the turret.
      float getTurretTopY()
      Gets the y-coordinate of the top of the turret.
      int getX()
      Gets the x-coordinate of the tank.
      int getY()
      Gets the y-coordinate of the tank.
      boolean hasExploded()
      Checks if the tank has exploded.
      void increaseFuel(int increaseFuel)
      Increases the fuel of the tank by the specified amount.
      void increaseHealth(int increaseHealth)
      Increases the health of the tank by the specified amount, but not exceeds 100.
      void increaseParachute(int n)
      Increases the number of parachutes by the specified amount.
      void increasePower()
      Increases the power level of the tank.
      boolean isDead()
      Checks if the tank is dead.
      boolean isFalling(int[] terrainHeight)
      Checks if the tank is falling or not.
      void largerProjectile()
      Enables the tank to fire a larger projectile.
      void lostHealth(int damage)
      Minus the health of the tank by the specified amount.
      void lostScore(int lostScore)
      Minus the score of the tank by the specified amount.
      void moveLeft(int[] terrainHeight)
      If the tank still have fuels, moves the tank to the left based on the terrain height.
      void moveRight(int[] terrainHeight)
      If the tank still have fuels, moves the tank to the right based on the terrain height.
      void moveTurretLeft()
      Moves the turret of the tank to the left.
      void moveTurretRight()
      Moves the turret of the tank to the right.
      void reset()
      Resets the tank's attributes to the initial values.
      void resetHealth()
      Resets the health of the tank to 100.
      void resetParachute()
      Resets the number of parachutes to 3.
      void resetScore()
      Resets the score of the tank to 0.
      void setLocation(int x, int y)
      Sets the location of the tank.
      void setPower(int power)
      Sets the power level of the tank.
      void setY(int y)
      Sets the y-coordinate of the tank.
      static java.util.HashMap<java.lang.Character,Tank> tank_location(char[][] levelMap, int[] terrainHeight)
      Gets the tank locations based on the level map and terrain height.
      void updateScore(int damage)
      Updates the tank's score based on the damage.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • Tank

        public Tank(char name,
            int x,
            int y)
        Creates a new Tank with the specified name and initial position.
        Parameters:
        name - name of the tank.
        x - initial x-coordinate of the tank.
        y - initial y-coordinate of the tank.

    • Method Detail

      • getName

        public char getName()
        Gets the name of the tank.
        Returns:
        name of the tank.

      • setY

        public void setY(int y)
        Sets the y-coordinate of the tank.
        Parameters:
        y - the new y-coordinate of the tank.

      • getX

        public int getX()
        Gets the x-coordinate of the tank.
        Returns:
        the x-coordinate of the tank.

      • getY

        public int getY()
        Gets the y-coordinate of the tank.
        Returns:
        the y-coordinate of the tank.

      • getScore

        public int getScore()
        Gets the score of the tank.
        Returns:
        the score of the tank.

      • resetScore

        public void resetScore()
        Resets the score of the tank to 0.

      • setLocation

        public void setLocation(int x,
                        int y)
        Sets the location of the tank.
        Parameters:
        x - the new x-coordinate of the tank
        y - the new y-coordinate of the tank

      • lostScore

        public void lostScore(int lostScore)
        Minus the score of the tank by the specified amount.
        Parameters:
        lostScore - the amount of score to be losted

      • moveLeft

        public void moveLeft(int[] terrainHeight)
        If the tank still have fuels, moves the tank to the left based on the terrain height.
        Parameters:
        terrainHeight - the array that contains terrain heights

      • moveRight

        public void moveRight(int[] terrainHeight)
        If the tank still have fuels, moves the tank to the right based on the terrain height.
        Parameters:
        terrainHeight - the array that contains terrain heights

      • largerProjectile

        public void largerProjectile()
        Enables the tank to fire a larger projectile.

      • getLargerProjectile

        public boolean getLargerProjectile()
        Checks if the tank is firing a larger projectile.
        Returns:
        true if the tank is firing a larger projectile, false otherwise

      • moveTurretLeft

        public void moveTurretLeft()
        Moves the turret of the tank to the left.

      • moveTurretRight

        public void moveTurretRight()
        Moves the turret of the tank to the right.

      • getTurretTopX

        public float getTurretTopX()
        Gets the x-coordinate of the top of the turret.
        Returns:
        x-coordinate of the turret's top

      • getTurretTopY

        public float getTurretTopY()
        Gets the y-coordinate of the top of the turret.
        Returns:
        y-coordinate of the turret's top

      • getRotateAngle

        public double getRotateAngle()
        Gets the current rotation angle of the turret.
        Returns:
        current rotation angle of the turret

      • getParachute

        public int getParachute()
        Gets the number of remaining parachutes the tank has.
        Returns:
        the number of parachutes

      • resetParachute

        public void resetParachute()
        Resets the number of parachutes to 3.

      • increaseParachute

        public void increaseParachute(int n)
        Increases the number of parachutes by the specified amount.
        Parameters:
        n - the number of parachutes to add

      • getPower

        public int getPower()
        Gets the power level of the tank.
        Returns:
        the power level of the tank

      • lostHealth

        public void lostHealth(int damage)
        Minus the health of the tank by the specified amount.
        Parameters:
        damage - the amount of health to be losted

      • increaseHealth

        public void increaseHealth(int increaseHealth)
        Increases the health of the tank by the specified amount, but not exceeds 100.
        Parameters:
        increaseHealth - the amount of health to be increased

      • resetHealth

        public void resetHealth()
        Resets the health of the tank to 100.

      • getHealth

        public int getHealth()
        Gets the current health of the tank.
        Returns:
        current health of the tank

      • getColor

        public int[] getColor(App app)
        Gets the color of the tank.
        Parameters:
        app - the application instance
        Returns:
        an array of RGB color values

      • isDead

        public boolean isDead()
        Checks if the tank is dead.
        Returns:
        true if the tank's health is less than or equal to 0, false otherwise

      • hasExploded

        public boolean hasExploded()
        Checks if the tank has exploded.
        Returns:
        true if the tank has exploded, false otherwise

      • tank_location

        public static java.util.HashMap<java.lang.Character,Tank> tank_location(char[][] levelMap,
                                                                        int[] terrainHeight)
        Gets the tank locations based on the level map and terrain height.
        Parameters:
        levelMap - A 2D array representing the level map.
        terrainHeight - the array that contains terrain heights
        Returns:
        a hashmap of tank locations

        public int getFuel()
        Gets the current fuel level of the tank.

        Resets the tank's attributes to the initial values.

        Sets the power level of the tank.

        public void increasePower()
        Increases the power level of the tank.

      • decreasePower

        public void decreasePower()
        Decreases the power level of the tank.

        public Projectile fireProjectile(int powerLevel)
        Fires a projectile from the tank with the given power level.
        Parameters:
        powerLevel - the power level of projectile
        Returns:
        the fired projectile

      • isFalling

        public boolean isFalling(int[] terrainHeight)
        Checks if the tank is falling or not.
        Parameters:
        terrainHeight - the array that contains terrain heights
        Returns:
        true if the tank is falling, false otherwise

      • calculateDamage

        public int calculateDamage(Explosion explosion)
        Calculates the damage from the explosion to the tank.
        Parameters:
        explosion - the explosion
        Returns:
        the damage to the tank

        public Explosion explode(int explosionRadius)
        Creates an explosion at the tank's location.

        the new explosion

      • updateScore

        Updates the tank's score based on the damage.
        Parameters:
        damage - the damage dealt
